channelId.title: Slack Channel ID
channelId.description: The Slack Channel ID of the Slack Channel to be archived.
channelId.einstein:description: The Slack Channel ID of the Slack Channel to be archived. A Slack Channel ID is represented as a string like C12345678. If a string like <#C123456789> is provided, extract a Slack Channel ID from it by removing the <# and > characters. For example, the Channel ID in <#C123456789> is C123456789.
